name: graphonomous
description: Graphonomous v0.3.2 continual learning engine — 29 MCP tools for persistent knowledge graph memory with retrieve/store/learn/deliberate loop, belief revision, intentional forgetting, epistemic frontier, evidence path tracing (Dijkstra), goal management, attention engine, and topology-aware κ-routing. GraphMemBench: 160/160 scenarios across 20 categories
